metadata.description: Deterministic nominal readback and flight-deck action delay used before commanded maneuver begins.
policy: Clearance state is shown immediately in the data block/scratchpad.
Actual aircraft maneuver starts after nominal_delay_sec.
min_delay_sec and max_delay_sec are retained for later randomization or scenario tuning.
notes: These values are simulator training parameters, not certified human-factor timing data.
Readback plus heading selector / mode action.
Readback plus speed intervention and thrust response start.
Readback plus altitude selector and vertical mode action.
Readback plus FMS direct-to setup before route tracking starts.
Readback plus FMS procedure activation before route tracking starts.
Readback plus FMS departure route activation before route tracking starts.
Readback plus approach setup before approach route tracking starts.
